hooks.command: jq -re '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(^| )(grep|rg|find)( |$)' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CODE DISCOVERY via grep/rg/find detected. CLAUDE.md rule: Graph before grep. Use CodeContextGraph MCP tools instead: 1) ToolSearch with query=select:mcp__CodeGraphContext__find_code,mcp__CodeGraphContext__analyze_code_relationships 2) Call find_code or analyze_code_relationships. Only use grep for literal content (README prose, fixture strings), not code discovery."}}' || true
